metadata.description: Navigate to handy.com/services/home-cleaning, fill in ZIP 11201, 3 beds, 2 baths, next Saturday at 9am, 3 hours, then click 'Get a Price'.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Get a price quote on Handy for a house cleaning service for next Saturday at 9am for a 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in Brooklyn (ZIP 11201). Select 3 hours duration.
